arcs.title: The Goblin Election
arcs.summary: Christine spoke to Ragnok directly on Tuesday morning: four minutes, three sentences, one very long silence, and a conditional agreement to consider giving the reference — which Gringotts legal is treating as binding while calling it voluntary. Ragnok cancelled his audit classification and ate a biscuit. Griphook the Younger's invented triplicate rule has been confirmed as invented last Tuesday; Thursday's hearing has grown from fifteen to forty-five minutes. Day 5 should resolve: Christine delivers her decision on the reference — and whatever she decides, it tips the election toward its conclusion in a way only she could manage.
